prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins with an almost entirely black frame, with only very faint, indistinct shapes near the bottom; no clear setting or subject is visible.

It then dissolves into an outdoor scene with strong image overlap. Two people wearing light-colored caps or brimmed hats appear in the foreground, seen from the side, with green foliage behind them. The frame looks layered, as if one shot is fading over another; small figures or objects are faintly visible near the lower center, but the details are unclear.

The next sampled moment is a fast, blurred action shot. A figure in a yellow or gold top appears to be moving quickly across an outdoor area, partially obscured by a bright vertical object in the foreground. The motion blur makes the activity difficult to identify.

Later, another dissolve or superimposed image shows a public outdoor setting, possibly a street or plaza, with several people in dark clothing and hats. A man in the foreground appears to be walking or gesturing. The background includes a reddish building or architectural façade. Because of the overlapping images, individual actions are hard to separate.

The sequence then shifts to a garden or yard scene. A person on the left, wearing a light top and darker lower garment, reaches toward something dark in the center of the frame. Dense plants and shrubs fill the foreground and background, with part of a house or structure visible behind them. The central dark shape may be an animal or object, but it is not clear from the frame.

The commercial ends on a close-up of a smiling young girl wearing a straw boater-style hat with a dark band and a visible letter “R” on the front. Other people are partly visible around her in a dark crowd-like setting. Large white text reading “UNITED” appears across the lower part of the frame, with a small logo mark in the lower-left corner.
